title: iseilema maculatum
intro: Iseilema maculatum, also known as the spotted grass or the spotted crab grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Iseilema maculatum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be applied topically in the form of a paste or ointment.
